content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.22%, Bank Nifty -1.10%, PSU Banks -1.89% — broad market is mixed with banking weakness offset by Energy/Metal/Pharma strength. Power and energy clusters showing strong momentum but my book already has heavy power/energy exposure (NTPC + POWERGRID). With 41% deployed, +0.17% session P&L, and three pending limit orders still working (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER), priority is managing existing book — trailing SLs to lock gains on PNBHOUSING/NESTLEIND/SUNPHARMA, not adding new correlated names.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4%. Current SL 1032.38 is already above entry — tightening slightly to 1025 (just below today's intraday low 1042 with buffer) locks in ~4.2% gain while giving room for consolidation. Strong Q4 (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%, dividend hike 60%). Stock has rallied hard so trail discipline appropriate. RR remains favorable to 1095."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op check — current SL 1420 already at breakeven+ vs entry 1412.94. Holding existing levels; no change warranted yet as price still consolidating below R1 1441. Will reassess if it clears 1445 with conviction."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at 406 (above entry 404.50). Price action constructive but Q4 result risk mid-May; current trail is appropriate. Will tighten further if it breaks above 414 (52w high)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at 1740 (above entry 1734). Organon deal creates leverage overhang; not trailing tighter yet because today's intraday range is 1714-1764, and 1740 sits below today's low — tightening further risks getting whipsawed on noise. Q4 results May 21 is the next event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.7%. SL 119 still ~3% away. Gold consolidating after correction; long-term thesis intact (geopolitical, INR weakness). Not exiting on minor red. Holding existing SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position flat (0%). Tightening SL from 318 to 315 doesn't qualify as 'tighten' for a long — that LOOSENS. Reverting: keep SL at 318 (no-op). Actually correcting: existing SL 318 is below entry 320.50; not eligible to tighten without raising. Emitting no-op MODIFY is wrong. Switching to HOLD via position_actions."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~4% gain; SL just below today's intraday support 1042 with buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor unrealized loss within tolerance; SL 119 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; let it run toward 1465 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already above entry 404.50; Q4 results mid-May upcoming."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1740 above entry; today's range too wide to tighten without whipsaw risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat position; SL 318 is appropriate — cannot loosen, and tightening to a number below current SL is invalid. Hold and watch May 19 results catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "JSWENERGY, NMDC, INTELLECT, ADANITOTALGAS look strong but I already have 3 power/energy names (NTPC, POWERGRID, plus pending TATAPOWER limit). Adding a 4th power name (JSWENERGY) would breach my own cluster discipline rule. NMDC near 52w high looks technically attractive but I'd prefer a pullback. MARUTI Q4 today is a binary event — avoid. INTELLECT contrarian IT strength interesting but down 22% over 1yr signals broken trend; pass. PVRINOX up 5% on a sector with no clear catalyst — one-day spike risk; pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 41% deployed, 6 holdings, +0.17% session. Three pending limit orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) still working from earlier — leaving them alone for now since underlying theses haven't broken. NOT adding new entries today: (1) 5-day track record is poor (15% win rate, 0.4x profit factor) — need to slow down and improve quality, not add turnover; (2) Power cluster already concentrated (NTPC+POWERGRID held + TATAPOWER pending = 3 names same theme); (3) PSU Bank weakness -1.89% suggests rate-sensitive financials cluster under pressure — caution on adding any financial name. Focus is purely on managing existing book and letting pending orders fill or expire."
}
